meta.pricingNote: No official document for Study.com was provided. Study.com's college-credit plans are typically billed monthly with a cap on proctored exams per month — verify current pricing and limits at study.com. Default used by the calculator is editable in Settings.
meta.dataNote: IMPORTANT: No official Study.com transfer agreement for this WGU program was available — everything in the old version of this page was unverified guesswork and has been removed. Cross-referencing the real WGU x Sophia Transfer Pathway Agreement now in this app, exactly two WGU General Education requirements have NO confirmed transfer path from any provider: 'Introduction to Systems Thinking and Applications' and 'Technology and Ethics: Emerging Trends and Society.' Whether Study.com (or any other provider) can cover them has not been verified. Do not purchase a Study.com course expecting either to transfer until you've confirmed it directly with a WGU enrollment counselor and a current, signed articulation agreement.

recommendationLegend.skip: Skip / do not purchase without verification

courses.name: Explore coverage for: Introduction to Systems Thinking and Applications
courses.wguEquivalent: Introduction to Systems Thinking and Applications
courses.tips: Call your WGU enrollment counselor and ask directly whether any external provider (Study.com, CLEP, another Sophia course not on the current agreement, etc.) can satisfy this requirement. If not, plan to complete it at WGU — the official guide estimates 30-40 hours.
courses.notes: This WGU requirement has NO Sophia transfer option on the official agreement, and no Study.com equivalency has been verified either. This card exists as a placeholder/reminder, not a course recommendation.
